zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Vaughn於1499年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾塔爾加斯時，她的父親Watkin Vaughan II39歲，母親Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville35歲。她於1520年與Sir Edward Lewis ll在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1558年11月17日在英國威爾斯布洛可爾特倫德享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Vaughn于1499年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾塔爾加斯时，她的父亲Watkin Vaughan II39岁，母亲Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville35岁。她于1520年与Sir Edward Lewis ll在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1558年11月17日在英国威尔斯布洛可爾特倫德享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vaughn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Vaughn was born in 1499, in Talgarth, Breconshire, Wales, her father, Watkin Vaughan II, was 39 and her mother, Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville, was 35. She married Sir Edward Lewis ll in 1520, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 17 November 1558, in Trenewydd, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Vaughn est née en 1499, à Talgarth, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Watkin Vaughan II, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward Lewis ll en 1520, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 17 novembre 1558, à Trenewydd, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Vaughn(이)가 1499년 웨일스 브레콘실르 탤가스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Watkin Vaughan II(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl aka Elizabeth Baskerville(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Edward Lewis ll(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 11월 17일 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 트렌w이드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.
